repo_prior_art.cite: No completed in-catalogue proposal states the nested recanting-witness target; the prior scm_prox_recant_pid angle was a simple natural-direct-effect proxy program.

published_prior_art.cite: DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 proves the general discrete-SCM reduction of declared causal constraints and targets to sharp polynomial optimization; this is its direct fixed-model instantiation.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue entry states this exact nested-target containment, though the prior simple-mediation proxy angle is adjacent.

published_prior_art.cite: BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 and GabrielSachsSjolander2023 provide the relevant no-proxy mediation-bound baseline; the projection from a proxy-factorized completion to a response-type completion is a routine refinement.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue entry states this exact reduction.

published_prior_art.cite: It is the elementary no-information special case of the response-function construction, adjacent to the no-proxy bounds in BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025.

repo_prior_art.cite: The earlier scm_prox_recant_pid simple-NDE program did not pose the nested recanting-witness endpoint-contraction question.

published_prior_art.cite: No verified paper gives an observed-data strict-contraction characterization for this proxy-factorized nested target after the relevant completeness conditions fail; closest results are BaiWuSunCui2026 under completeness and GabrielSachsSjolander2023 without proxies.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The claimed exact finite response-function identified-set program is a routine application of DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024's general sharp polynomial-program framework, not an independently new theorem-level result.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / related-work comparison to BaiWuSunCui2026
novelty_flags.one_line: BaiWuSunCui2026 identifies E[Y(1,D(1),M(0,D(1)))], whereas the proposal targets a contrast involving Y(1,L(0),M(1,L(0))); it is a related recanting-witness PSE, not "this" effect.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses GabrielSachsSjolander2023, which gives sharp bounds for decompositions with two sequential binary mediators and unmeasured mediator-outcome confounding, the closest no-proxy nested-mediation comparator.

soundness_flags.label: ass:outcome-proxy-incompleteness
soundness_flags.one_line: The global rank condition rank{C_W(lambda,q^W)}<K is not BaiWuSunCui2026's conditional Completeness-W failure, which is stated conditional on A and D; correct the standard label/citation or retag it as a model-specific condition.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 / TLDR / project justification
soundness_flags.one_line: Rank deficiency of W alone neither rules out BaiWuSunCui2026's Z-based completeness strategy nor establishes failure of its W-completeness in every required conditioning stratum, so the advertised "after bridge inversion fails" regime is not encoded by the statements.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Finite proxy-factorized sensitivity model
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Fixed K, the active-class mass floor, and conditional proxy factorization are accepted as a conditional finite latent-measurement regime.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any sharp set or strict-contraction result is claimed only under the repaired finite proxy-factorized model, not under unrestricted latent cardinality or general proximal models.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the global W-rank label with explicit conditional rank/failure conditions for every BaiWuSunCui bridge route being excluded, including the Z-based route, or narrow the prose to a W-rank-deficient proxy-factorized model without claiming general bridge failure.

Add GabrielSachsSjolander2023 and state the exact counterfactual formula it bounds; then prove whether its no-proxy interval equals Theta_0(P) for the proposed nested target before promising strict tightening.

Make strict contraction the sole headline kernel by supplying a positive binary K=3 witness and an open neighborhood or explicit semialgebraic endpoint-exclusion certificate; retain the generic sharp-program theorem only as supporting machinery.

recommended_next_step: Repair the completeness-failure regime and comparator formulas, expand the survey with GabrielSachsSjolander2023, then pursue a concrete positive strict-contraction witness as the field-level kernel.
